heading: COMPENSATORY, INTENSIVE, AND ACCELERATED INSTRUCTION
operative_text: (a) Each school district shall use the student performance data resulting from the basic skills assessment instruments and achievement tests administered under Subchapter B, Chapter 39, to design and implement appropriate compensatory, intensive, or accelerated instructional services for students in the district's schools that enable the students to be performing at grade level at the conclusion of the next regular school term.

defined_terms.term: student at risk of dropping out of school
